<template>
    
</template>

<script>


    import SideMenu from "./inc/SideMenu";
    export default  {
        name:"Index",
        components: {
            SideMenu
        }
    }

</script>

<style scoped>
    .el-container{
        padding: 0;
        margin: 0;
        display:flex;
        min-height: 100vh;
    }

    .el-header {
        background-color: #17B3A3;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: center;
        padding: 0 20px;
        height: 60px;
    }

    .header-avatar {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
    }

    .el-dropdown-link {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .el-aside {
        background-color: #D3DCE6;
        color: #333;
        text-align: left;
        line-height: 200px;
    }

    .el-main {
        color: #333;
        text-align: center;
        line-height: 160px;
        padding: 0;
    }





    a {
        text-decoration: none;
    }
</style>
